2606.07157.title: Think Fast: Estimating No-CoT Task-Completion Time Horizons of Frontier AI Models
2606.07157.paper_summary: Many efforts to ensure frontier AI models are safe rely on monitoring their chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning. If models become able to perform sufficiently complex reasoning internally, without explicit thinking tokens, this would undermine such oversight. We measure how well frontier models reason without CoT across a suite of over 30,000 questions spanning 43 benchmarks in domains including math, coding, puzzles, causality, theory-of-mind, and strategic reasoning. To compare models against humans, we estimate the $50\%$-task-completion time horizon (TH): the human time required for tasks a model completes with $50\%$ success rate. We complement this with a $50\%$ reasoning token horizon: the minimum number of o3-mini reasoning tokens needed for tasks a model solves with $50\%$ success rate. We find that the no-CoT $50\%$ TH of frontier models has been doubling roughly every year over the past six years, with GPT-5.5's TH reaching over 3 minutes and reasoning token horizon exceeding 1,500 tokens. Our median estimates predict that frontier no-CoT THs could exceed 7 minutes by 2028, and 25 minutes by 2030, though these projections carry substantial uncertainty. We recommend frontier developers track this explicitly.
2606.07157.paper_summary_zh: 許多確保前沿 AI 模型安全的努力依賴於監控其思維鏈（CoT）推理。<lb/>如果模型能夠在內部執行足夠複雜的推理，而不需要明確的思考標記，這將削弱這種監督。<lb/>我們測量了前沿模型在沒有 CoT 的情況下，對於超過 30,000 個問題的推理能力，這些問題涵蓋了包括數學、編程、謎題、因果關係、心智理論和策略推理等 43 個基準領域。<lb/>為了將模型與人類進行比較，我們估計了 $50\%$ 任務完成時間範圍（TH）：人類完成模型以 $50\%$ 成功率所需的任務時間。<lb/>我們還補充了 $50\%$ 推理標記範圍：模型以 $50\%$ 成功率解決任務所需的最少 o3-mini 推理標記數量。<lb/>我們發現，前沿模型的無 CoT $50\%$ TH 在過去六年中大約每年翻倍，GPT-5.5 的 TH 超過 3 分鐘，推理標記範圍超過 1,500 個標記。<lb/>我們的中位數估計預測，前沿無 CoT TH 到 2028 年可能超過 7 分鐘，到 2030 年可能超過 25 分鐘，儘管這些預測帶有相當大的不確定性。<lb/>我們建議前沿開發者明確跟踪這一點。
2606.07157.author: Dewi Gould et.al.
2606.07157.authors: Dewi Gould, Francis Rhys Ward, Anders Cairns Woodruff, Rauno Arike, Josh Hills, Alex Serrano, Ida Caspary, Jason Ross Brown, Jo J. Jiao, Patrick Leask, Twm Stone, Ram Potham, Ionut Gabriel Stan, Harry Mayne, Simeon Hellsten, Shubhorup Biswas, Ariana Azarbal, William L. Anderson, Elle Najt, Ryan Greenblatt, Julian Stastny
